action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current numerical environmental data including air quality, PM2.5 density, traffic levels, and industrial activity.

action_set_definitions.name: get_active_advisories
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the list of currently active public health or traffic warnings.

action_set_definitions.name: contain_industrial_fire
action_set_definitions.description: Deploys specialized suppression teams to the plastics recycling facility to extinguish the fire and halt the emission of particulates and chemical precursors.

suppression_intensity.description: The level of resources to deploy (0.0 to 1.0).

action_set_definitions.name: update_traffic_control
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the target traffic density level to influence air quality.

action_set_definitions.name: update_industrial_control
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the operational capacity of heavy industry zones to manage air quality.

action_set_definitions.name: post_public_advisory
action_set_definitions.description: Issues a new public health or safety warning to the environment.

advisory_text.description: The specific health or traffic warning message.

state_description.traffic_density: Current traffic volume as a percentage of peak capacity (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.industrial_activity_level: Operational capacity of heavy industry zones (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.active_advisories: List of currently active public health or traffic warnings.
state_description.wind_speed: Current wind speed in km/h, affecting pollutant dispersion.
state_description.public_compliance_rate: Likelihood of the public following new restrictions (0.0 to 1.0).
